metadata.generated_at_utc_note: fixed deterministic timestamp; regenerate command provenance is captured by git commit/status
metadata.manuscript_prose_policy: row-level paper-foundation contracts only; no manuscript prose drafting
metadata.raw_dataset_policy: protected local input only; excluded from handoff evidence artifacts
metadata.raw_dataset_policy_marker: protected local raw dataset input prefix

theory_statement_contract.assumptions: fixed graph and candidate set; train/validation/test split separation; transparent GLS/MAP or GSP reconstruction; budget k derived from budget fraction
theory_statement_contract.non_claim_boundaries: does not assert global optimality or guaranteed MAE improvement
theory_statement_contract.scoped_statement: Choose a fixed sensor set S with |S| <= k from observed candidates; learn reconstruction ingredients on training splits, tune layout selection on validation splits, and report final reconstruction only on held-out test splits after the selection rule is fixed.

theory_statement_contract.assumptions: linear-Gaussian prior and observation model; squared-error loss; hidden-component posterior covariance computed after conditioning on selected sensors
theory_statement_contract.non_claim_boundaries: does not convert posterior trace into an MAE guarantee for non-Gaussian traffic data
theory_statement_contract.scoped_statement: Under the stated linear-Gaussian squared-error model, the posterior covariance trace over hidden components equals the conditional expected squared reconstruction error up to the fixed observation/noise model used by the estimator.

theory_statement_contract.assumptions: same prior/noise model before and after adding the sensor; valid conditioning update; no model refit between nested sensor sets
theory_statement_contract.non_claim_boundaries: does not imply submodularity, approximation ratio, or monotone empirical MAE on every split
theory_statement_contract.scoped_statement: For the same linear-Gaussian model, conditioning on an additional sensor cannot increase the posterior covariance in positive-semidefinite order, so posterior trace is nonincreasing as sensors are added.
theory_statement_contract.source_role: posterior covariance and trace helper implementation

theory_statement_contract.assumptions: finite evaluated neighborhood; deterministic validation score for a fixed split and method; configured add/remove pools and iteration budget define the neighborhood
theory_statement_contract.non_claim_boundaries: does not assert global optimality outside the evaluated one-swap neighborhood
theory_statement_contract.scoped_statement: A validation-aware swap output is locally optimal with respect to the evaluated one-swap neighborhood when no tested remove/add exchange from the configured candidate pool strictly improves validation reconstruction loss.

theory_statement_contract.assumptions: finite candidate counts and budget list; transparent evaluator cost is measured per candidate/swap; launcher defaults define the reported workload
theory_statement_contract.non_claim_boundaries: does not claim polynomial-time optimal placement certification or hardware-independent runtime guarantees
theory_statement_contract.scoped_statement: RCSS runtime can be stated as candidate generation plus candidate scoring plus validation-aware swap evaluation, scaling with the configured candidate counts, budgets, validation windows, swap starts, swap iterations, and add/remove pool sizes recorded by launchers and manifests.
